title: Review: daemon/cli/tui round 18
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — two P0 correctness bugs involve wire protocol mismatches (message_set Chat-not-PeerDeliver, TUI /pay broadcasts to all) that will produce silent failures in federated scenarios and privacy leaks. P0 blocking issues: TUI blocking I/O on tokio thread will freeze the UI on any slow command or filesystem operation.
Confidence: 25% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) jmap.rs is 4000+ lines and only the first 2400 were read in full - message_set update and delete paths, space_set update path, and the eventsource ping handler were not exhaustively checked; (2) the CLI commands.rs is 3000+ lines and only the first 500 and the /pay section were read - other slash commands not reviewed. Would raise confidence if: full read of jmap.rs message_set update/delete paths, and CLI /confirm, /file commands were reviewed.
